ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Rs. 5,000 Debit from ABC Store
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a transaction of Rs. 5,000.00 from your account ending 1234 on 07/04/2024 at 10:15 AM. The transaction was made at ABC Store in Mumbai.

Yadi aapne is transaction ko authorize nahi kiya hai, to turant hamse sampark karein. Please contact our support immediately at 1800-123-456 or reply to this email.

Thank you,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Zoom Meeting is Scheduled! Please Confirm
spam.body:
Hi [Name],

Your Zoom meeting titled 'Quarterly Review' is scheduled for tomorrow at 3:00 PM IST.

Join Link: <URL>
Meeting ID: 123 456 7890
Passcode: 123456

Please ensure you join on time. If you have any issues, click the link above.

Important: Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email.

Thanks,
Zoom Support
